description_long: This is a pair of low-top casual sneakers with a rich brown upper and black soles, designed for everyday urban wear. The shoes feature prominent white stitching along the seams, adding a contrasting detail to the dark leather-like material. The laces are dark gray and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through metal eyelets. The toe and heel areas are reinforced with a darker, possibly rubberized material for added durability. The brand name 'Arnt' is embroidered in white on the heel counter of each shoe, and a stylized white logo is visible on the tongue. The overall construction suggests comfort and durability, suitable for walking on city streets and sidewalks.
description: A pair of brown low-top sneakers with black soles, white stitching, and gray laces, featuring the brand name 'Arnt' and a white logo on the tongue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, gray laces, and white logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white stitching, brown upper, and black sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'Arnt' branding on the heel and the shoe's low-cut collar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing stitching details and the overall silhouette.
attribute_logo: White stylized logo on the tongue of each shoe
